mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, source_id, source_url, title, description, import_time, status, fail_reason FROM article WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY import_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (user_id, source_id, source_url, title, description, import_time, status, fail_reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sourceId}, #{sourceUrl}, #{title}, #{description}, #{importTime}, #{status}, #{failReason})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET source_url = #{sourceUrl}, title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, fail_reason = #{failReason} WHERE id = #{id}
